## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest test_aio.py -v` passes (add a test for new functions)
- [ ] `bash -n runaio.sh stopaio.sh` passes (if shell scripts changed)
- [ ] New public functions have at least one test in `test_aio.py`
- [ ] Single-file design of `aio.py` maintained (no new top-level files unless necessary)
